series_metadata.series_description: Dietitians are required to complete a set amount of continuing education. Documentation is required for dietitians not registered with the Commission on Dietetic Registration to be sent for compliance verification. Records are retained in separate licen

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in Board office for 5 years (fiscal) then destroy provided CE audit is complete and audit report is released. (Audit means audited by the Auditor of the State and the audit report is released., Paper: Wastepaper
